title: triticum ibericum
intro: Triticum ibericum, also known as Iberian wheat or wild emmer, is a rare and ancient wild grass species belonging to the wheat family. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which can help alleviate digestive issues and skin problems. The health benefits of Triticum ibericum include its potential to support gut health, boost the immune system, and reduce inflammation in the body. Triticum ibericum is often used in herbal preparations, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
